meaning: adv.鍒版棤娉曡鏄庣殑绋嬪害
examples: She suddenly and inexplicably announced her retirement.
Then, inexplicably, he TURNS. Walks away.
The Starbucks Card offers zero added value, but its customers are inexplicably racing to buy them.
It was inexplicably delayed, leading to accusations that the company was sitting on the trial.
